_comment: A few representative sentences per field. JD/resume text is classified by nearest-anchor cosine similarity (mean of that domain's anchor embeddings). Add anchors to extend to new fields.

software_engineering: Design, build, and maintain backend and frontend software systems using languages like Java, Python, JavaScript, or Go.
Write clean, tested, production code and ship features across the full stack.
Experience with REST APIs, databases, version control, and cloud infrastructure such as AWS or Kubernetes.
data_ml: Build machine learning models and data pipelines using Python, pandas, and TensorFlow or PyTorch.
Analyze large datasets, train and evaluate predictive models, and deploy them to production.
Experience with SQL, data warehousing, statistics, and natural language processing.
marketing: Plan and execute marketing campaigns across SEO, paid ads, email, and social media.
Own brand strategy, content marketing, and go-to-market planning to drive growth.
Experience with Google Ads, HubSpot, campaign analytics, and audience segmentation.
sales: Generate and close new business through outbound prospecting and relationship management.
Manage a sales pipeline and quota using a CRM such as Salesforce.
Experience with lead generation, account management, and contract negotiation.
finance_accounting: Prepare financial statements, reconciliations, and reports in compliance with GAAP.
Build financial models, forecasts, and budgets for business planning (FP&A).
Experience with QuickBooks, Excel modeling, audits, and accounts payable/receivable.
design_ux: Design user interfaces and experiences using Figma, wireframes, and prototypes.
Conduct user research and usability testing to inform product design decisions.
Experience with visual design systems, interaction design, and design critique.
product_management: Own the product roadmap, backlog, and prioritization across engineering and design.
Define requirements, write PRDs, and run A/B tests to validate product decisions.
Experience with Jira, stakeholder alignment, and go-to-market coordination for product launches.
hr_recruiting: Manage recruiting pipelines, interview coordination, and offer negotiation using an ATS.
Own onboarding, employee relations, payroll, and HR policy compliance.
Experience with talent acquisition, workforce planning, and performance management.
operations_supply_chain: Manage supply chain, logistics, and inventory operations to improve efficiency.
Run process improvement initiatives using Lean or Six Sigma methodology.
Experience with ERP systems, vendor management, and warehouse operations.
customer_support: Resolve customer issues via chat, email, and phone using a ticketing system like Zendesk.
Maintain SLAs and CSAT targets while troubleshooting product problems for customers.
Experience with help-desk software, escalation handling, and customer success workflows.
healthcare_clinical: Provide direct patient care, clinical assessments, and treatment planning in a healthcare setting.
Maintain patient records, administer medications, and follow clinical protocols.
Experience with EHR systems, nursing or clinical certifications, and patient safety standards.
legal: Draft, review, and negotiate contracts and legal agreements.
Conduct legal research and advise on regulatory compliance.
Experience with litigation support, corporate law, or paralegal case management.
education_teaching: Plan and deliver curriculum and lesson plans for students in a classroom setting.
Assess student performance and adapt instruction to learning needs.
Experience with classroom management, lesson planning, and educational assessment tools.
manufacturing_engineering: Design, test, and improve mechanical or electrical systems and manufacturing processes.
Use CAD tools to develop product designs and run quality control checks.
Experience with manufacturing processes, CAD/CAM, and industrial engineering standards.
